description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Tests that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have two jobs: lint and build. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.8, installs tox, and runs tox for lint and black. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on lint, and uses a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.8 to 3.12. For each Python version, it checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs tox, and runs tox for tests.
